reason: The provided outline is sound, and the failures can be addressed by making specific changes to each section.

section_feedback.Section 1 - Constants and Imports: Remove the import of pygame library as it's not necessary for a text-based chess simulator.
section_feedback.Section 2 - Chess Piece Classes: Implement AI logic within the AIPlayer class to enable playing multiple strategies. This can be achieved by adding methods such as make_move() or choose_strategy().
section_feedback.Section 3 - Chess Board and Move Notatio: Develop functionality to record moves in chess notation and save them to a file as specified. Use the FILE_NAME constant to specify the output file.
section_feedback.Section 4 - AI Players and Game Logic: Enhance the board display and move execution to provide a complete visual simulation of the game. This can be achieved by using print statements or other text-based visualization methods.
section_feedback.Section 5 - Main Entry Point: Implement a game loop that uses the AI players to make moves and update the board state.
